title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 March 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 March 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 01 March 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 01/03/2024
The ship recycling markets across India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Turkiye are currently navigating through varying degrees of stagnation and cautious trading. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-03-01_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-24-February-01-March-2024_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2024-03-01_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-24-February-01-March-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
24 February 2024 - 01 March 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling markets across India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Turkiye are currently navigating through varying degrees of stagnation and cautious
trading. In India, the market is experiencing a downturn with a significant drop in demand for vessels and scrap materials, signaling a market stagnation.
